pi_items.source: Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 9, export_result.sh line 11, and verifier.py line 116
Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 10, export_result.sh line 26, and verifier.py line 80
verifier.py line 63 enforces: if result.get('note_size', 0) > 50. The metadata value of 100 is not used anywhere in the verification logic.
verifier.py line 85 retrieves keywords from task_info metadata dict; code correctly uses all 9 keywords listed in task.json

privileged_info_summary: The task uses GCompris educational software (real, not synthetic). Output paths are verified: screenshot saved to /home/ga/Documents/renewable_energy_screenshot.png and lesson note to /home/ga/Documents/renewable_energy_lesson_note.txt. The verifier checks: screenshot size > 10KB (line 51), note size > 50 bytes (line 63, not 100 as claimed), presence of at least 2 keywords from a list of 9 (energy, solar, wind, water, hydro, power, electricity, turbine, renewable), and a question mark in the note (line 95). VLM verification confirms the screenshot shows the Renewable Energy activity and checks trajectory navigation. Contradicted claim: metadata specifies min_note_length of 100, but verifier enforces 50 bytes minimum.
